ocr_reason: Small quantitative plot labels and dense bullet text are OCR-suitable.

blocks.text:
1. RL success matched the deterministic policy: 0.00 ± 0.19 percentage-point difference
2. Deterministic rules beat random selection by 15.63 ± 1.86 points
3. The safety override reduced non-escalation by 15.03 ± 0.66 points
4. RL provided an inspectable learned policy, but did not outperform rules in this benchmark
5. Structured decision logic and external guardrails produced most of the reliability
